content_body: Masseria, located in Blue Ridge, GA, is a charming Italian eatery known for its rustic ambiance and authentic cuisine. Offering a menu rich with traditional Italian dishes crafted from fresh, locally sourced ingredients, Masseria provides a delightful dining experience. Guests can enjoy handmade pastas, wood-fired pizzas, and a variety of seasonal specialties, all served in a warm and inviting atmosphere. Perfect for a romantic dinner or a casual meal with friends, Masseria brings a taste of Italy to the heart of Blue Ridge.
title: Masseria Kitchen & Bar
